## ![][image1]

Timeline Questionnaire Template \- Elopement & Intimate Wedding

**Why it matters:** This questionnaire gathers info about what a couple has booked and planned thus far in the planning process and helps remind them to figure these details out if they haven’t already. Once your couple has filled it out, their answers should give you insight into creating their photo coverage timeline and how to best document their wedding day.

**When to send:** I typically send this 3 months out from a couple’s wedding day (unless they request the questionnaire earlier) or are planning on a very short timeframe.

---

Timeline Planning Questionnaire \- Elopement & Intimate Wedding

**Your Day\!**

* Please confirm your wedding date (Month, Day, Year) and what day of the week it falls on, here (of course I know this already—I just like to confirm):

* What will be the best mailing address for the two of you after your wedding day?

* What are your Instagram & Facebook handles? I’d love to follow you two\!  
    
* Please list one emergency contact for my records (name, relation, and phone number):  
    
* Please list all of your chosen elopement day locations here (be as specific as possible):  
    
* How & why did you choose your specific elopement location?  
    
* Now that you have a clearer idea of how you want your elopement day to be, how would you describe your "vision" for your elopement day?  
    
* In planning your elopement thus far, what have you found to be the most important to you about your wedding experience?  
    
* Do you have any specific colors, styles, themes, or vibes that you're going for? 

   
**Your Timeline**

* Would you prefer sunrise or sunset? Or do you want me to tell you what I think is best for your location? (Lighting is best for photography in the early morning and evening).  
    
* What sounds like a perfect way to start out your wedding day from the time you get up? How would you like to start your morning?

* Where are each of you getting ready? Please provide the name, address, and a link to your accommodation and/or a description of the rooms.  
    
* Are you planning on helping each other get ready? Or would you like us to help organize a “first look” (a special experience of seeing each other in your wedding clothes for the first time as a “surprise”)?

* Are there any special details that you have as a part of your day and would like captured? (accessories, shoes, jewelry, vows, invitations or announcements, flowers, heirlooms, gifts, etc.)  
    
* Where do you plan to have your ceremony? Do you have an exact spot picked out already or do you want to spontaneously choose it the day of?  
    
* What do you plan to do during your ceremony and how long do you think it will last? (i.e. read handwritten vows, read letters from friends & family, exchange rings, play or listen to a song, pop champagne, etc.) \*Please note, if you plan to have a fixed structure during your ceremony please consult with me due to lighting and Leave No Trace implications.  
    
* Aside from your getting ready & ceremony locations, where else do you envision having photographs captured? Do you have any specific places or types of scenery in mind?  
    
* Is there anything that you two love to do or any other fun activities in mind that you think could be a fun part of your wedding experience (even if you aren’t sure how to include them)? I.e. relaxing in a hammock, stargazing, riding bikes, renting 4x4, ATVs, or a vintage vehicle,  a helicopter or float plane tour, sailboat tour, kayaking, paddleboarding, rafting, rock-climbing/bouldering, hot air ballooning, cliff jumping, visiting a brewery/winery, games/puzzles, yoga, fishing, horseback riding).  
    
* Is there anything you have in mind to celebrate after your ceremony (i.e. picnic, dinner, champagne, dancing, campfire, cake, etc.)?

* What sounds like a perfect way to wrap up the day you get married? What would be fun to do for the last few hours before heading to bed (stargazing, toast, hot tub soak, charcuterie by a fire, etc.)?  
    
* What is your plan for staying nourished and hydrated during your day? Do you have special times planned for food or are you eating on the go? P.S. Please bring water\! :)  
    
* When do you plan to arrive in the area where you’re getting married? And how long do you plan to stay in the area? Do you have any fun things planned (or ideas of what you’d like to do the day before or the day after you get married)?  
    
* If you have any surprises planned for your partner on your wedding day, please email me separately about this (I love helping arrange surprises\!)


**Final Thoughts**

* Have you told other people your elopement plans or is it a surprise? How do you plan to tell people, if at all?

* Besides you two, who do you think will be the most excited to see the photos of your wedding experience & why? 

* 5 years down the road, when you look back on the images of “how you got married”—what are the most important things you will want to see in them? 

* Is there anything else I should know as your photographer that I haven’t asked about?

   
**Vendor Information (Please provide their name, email, and website)**

* Do you have an officiant, are you self-solemnizing, or do you need me to sign as your officiant (if applicable)?  
    
* Do you have a hair stylist?  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email


* Do you have a make-up artist?  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email


* Do you have a florist?  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email


* Describe your flowers. What was the inspiration for them?  
    
* Do you have a videographer?  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email


* Do you have an elopement or intimate wedding planner?  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email


* Do you have a caterer and/or baker?  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email


* Do you have a band or musician?  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email


* Where did you both get your wedding day attire? What brand of suit, dress, etc. are you wearing?  
    
* Who are the makers or designers of your accessories? (i.e. shoes, veil, jewelry, cufflinks, watches, etc.)  
    
* Are there any other vendors you would like to give a shout-out to?

 

**Intimate Wedding Information: (skip if you are eloping just the two of you)**

* How many guests will be attending?  
    
* Have you already specified an official ceremony time to your guests?  
    
* Please list the formal photos you'd like me to take, including names & your relation to them. Note: Please allow about 3 minutes for every combination.  
    
* Do you have a reception or party planned on your elopement day? If so, when and what is the address? What do you have planned for that time (i.e. toasts, cake cutting, dancing, etc.)?

* When do your guests plan to arrive in the area where you’re getting married? And how long do they plan to stay in the area? Do you have any fun things planned with them (or ideas of what you’d like to do the day before or the day after you get married)?  
    
* Are there any special circumstances that I should be aware of in regard to any of your guests?
